title: Blueprint Studio
concept: A Blueprint-first Playground workspace for theme authors that starts with gallery filtering, Blueprint URL execution, and current blueprint editing before progressively revealing saved sites, settings, files, database, logs, and exports.
focus: Blueprints as the primary organizing object
flows: Browse and filter Blueprint gallery cards, select featured Blueprints, inspect blueprint JSON, and run the chosen Blueprint
Run a Blueprint from URL, copy the current Blueprint link, download its bundle, and edit the current blueprint.json
Start a new Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, or .zip import
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with visible progress
Manage unsaved and saved Playgrounds with rename and delete actions
Use Site Manager disclosures for settings, file browser, database inspection, logs, export to GitHub, and zip download
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
